page.title: Template:Country data Reformed Government of the Republic of China

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{ {{{1<noinclude> |country showdata </noinclude>}}} | alias = Reformed Government of the Republic of China | flag alias = Flag of China (1912–1928).svg | link alias-army = Collaborationist Chinese Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Wang Jingwei regime | related2 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | related3 = Republic of China | related4 = C...'
1 revision imported: trying to get rid of some red links from probably deleted pages

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Country data Reformed Government of the Republic of China
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude> |country showdata </noinclude>}}} | alias = Reformed Government of the Republic of China | flag alias = Flag of China (1912–1928).svg | link alias-army = Collaborationist Chinese Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Wang Jingwei regime | related2 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | related3 = Republic of China | related4 = China </noinclude> }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23931424921|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Reformed_Government_of_the_Republic_of_China here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Reformed_Government_of_the_Republic_of_China for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude> |country showdata </noinclude>}}} | alias = Reformed Government of the Republic of China | flag alias = Flag of China (1912–1928).svg | link alias-army = Collaborationist Chinese Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Wang Jingwei regime | related2 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | related3 = Republic of China | related4 = China </noinclude> }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
